untranslatable_reason: Pattern requires comparative analysis of two distinct 'bottoms' with median-based price variation measurement. The exact definition of 'bottom low to bottom low measured against median' and the distinction between 'lower left bottom' vs 'lower right bottom' scenarios cannot be precisely replicated with available indicators. Pattern also lacks explicit exit conditions (marked AUTHOR_SILENT). Low success rate (33-37%) and unknown avg_rise/avg_decline further limit reliable conversion.
